revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing blank templates I made to fill out template blank links
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>
[[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude> [[Category:New]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Category:Pages with blank templates" to "Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}"
revision.text: [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Find sources multi]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude> [[Category:New]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
<noinclude>
</noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
}}</noinclude> \n</noinclude>

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Find_sources_multi here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Find_sources_multi for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <noinclude>
</noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
}}</noinclude> \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
